fields.label: Condition Immunity Source Creature Types

log.why: Protection from Evil and Good blocks Charmed and Frightened only from a named source creature-type set.

fields.comment: Lists the source creature types whose condition-causing effects are blocked by a condition-immunity defensive effect. Leave this as `not_applicable` for unconditional immunities like Heroism, and populate it only when the canonical prose limits the immunity by source creature type. It maps to `effects[].attackerFilter.creatureTypes[]` on the condition-immunity DEFENSIVE effect. Purpose: Condition Immunity Source Creature Types exists so source-limited immunity is not flattened into a generic condition-immunity list.
